headline: Medtronic (MDT) Could Be 9% Undervalued On Recall News
summary: Medtronic (MDT) is in focus after the US Food and Drug Administration published an enforcement report on a voluntary Class II recall of the Octopus 4 Tissue Stabilizer, citing an assembly issue affecting 590 units. See our latest analysis for Medtronic. At a share price of $82.39, Medtronic has had a mixed run, with the 1-day share price return of 0.46% contrasting with a year to date share price decline of 14.22% and a 5 year total shareholder return that is down 23.13%. This suggests...
